Sell with confidence

A smarter, more supported way to sell

Strategic pricing • Elevated presentation • Calm guidance from start to close

A thoughtful approach to selling

Selling your home is more than a transaction — it’s a transition. My role is to help you move forward with clarity, preparation, and strong representation at every step.

What you can expect

Strategic Pricing

I analyze local trends, buyer behavior, and comparable sales to position your home where it attracts the strongest interest.

Thoughtful Preparation

Small improvements can create meaningful results. I help identify the updates, staging, and presentation choices that make the biggest impact.

Powerful Exposure

Your home benefits from Coldwell Banker marketing resources plus targeted digital and local exposure designed to reach qualified buyers.

Skilled Negotiation

Offers are only the beginning. I guide negotiations with strategy and perspective to help secure strong terms.

Clear Communication

Selling can feel complex. My goal is to make it feel organized and understandable, with steady communication from start to close.

The selling process

  1. ONE

    Strategy & pricing

    We review goals, timing, and market data to set a pricing and launch plan.

  2. TWO

    Preparation

    We align improvements, staging, and presentation to maximize buyer response.

  3. THREE

    Launch & marketing

    Professional photography, online exposure, and targeted outreach to qualified buyers.

  4. FOUR

    Offers & negotiation

    We evaluate terms, manage timing, and negotiate with clarity and leverage.

  5. FIVE

    Escrow to close

    I coordinate details and deadlines so you feel informed, supported, and confident.

Seller resources

Practical guides designed to make decisions easier — before your home hits the market.

PDF Guide

Prep to Sell Checklist

A room-by-room checklist to prepare your home for photos and showings.

PDF Guide

Pricing Strategy

How pricing influences demand, timing, and negotiation leverage.

Worksheet

Selling Timeline Planner

A simple timeline to map prep, listing, escrow, and your next move.

Worksheet

Offer Review Sheet

Compare offers clearly: price, terms, contingencies, timelines, and risk.

Common seller questions

When is the best time to list?
Timing depends on your goals, inventory, and buyer demand. I’ll help you evaluate seasonality and local trends so you can list with a plan.
Do I need to renovate before selling?
Not always. Often, targeted improvements and presentation choices create the best return without over-investing.
How do we handle showings and privacy?
We can tailor showing windows, notice periods, and guidelines. The goal is strong buyer access without disrupting your life more than necessary.

Thinking about selling?

If you’re considering a move, I’ll help you understand your options and what the current market looks like for homes like yours.
